parameters.subject: =🔥 HOT LEAD: {{ $json.intake.contact_name }} ({{ $json.intake.company_name }}) — Score {{ $json.intake.qualification_score }}
parameters.message:
=

Hot Lead Alert

Name: {{ $json.intake.contact_name }}
Company: {{ $json.intake.company_name }}
Email: {{ $json.intake.contact_email }}
Phone: {{ $json.intake.contact_phone }}
Budget: ${{ $json.intake.monthly_budget }}/mo
Timeline: {{ $json.intake.urgency_level }}
Score: {{ $json.intake.qualification_score }}/100
Industry: {{ $json.intake.service_category }}

Their Message

{{ $json.intake.message_body }}

AI Summary

{{ $json.intake.classification_result.summary }}

Action: Schedule a call immediately.

parameters.subject: =Thanks for reaching out, {{ $json.intake.contact_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Thanks for getting in touch!

Hi {{ $json.intake.contact_name }},

We received your inquiry and wanted to send over some information about how we can help {{ $json.intake.company_name || 'your business' }}.

A member of our team will follow up within 1–2 business days. In the meantime, feel free to reply to this email with any questions.

Best,
The Team

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Manual Review Required: {{ $json.intake.contact_name }} ({{ $json.intake.intake_id }})
parameters.message:
=

Manual Review Required

A lead could not be automatically classified and requires your review.

Name: {{ $json.intake.contact_name }}
Email: {{ $json.intake.contact_email }}
Company: {{ $json.intake.company_name }}
Budget: ${{ $json.intake.monthly_budget }}/mo
Intake ID: {{ $json.intake.intake_id }}
Flags: {{ $json.intake.flags.join(', ') }}

Message

{{ $json.intake.message_body }}

Please review and update the lead record in the dashboard.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO intake_log (
  intake_id, execution_id, workflow_version, client_id,
  source_type, source_channel,
  contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, company_name,
  request_type, service_category, urgency_level, monthly_budget,
  message_body, raw_payload, normalized_payload,
  validation_passed, validation_errors, is_spam, is_duplicate,
  classification_result, confidence_score,
  ai_model_used, ai_model_source, ai_response_time_ms, ai_fallback_used,
  qualification_score, qualification_tier, recommended_action,
  route_taken, human_review_needed, flags,
  received_at, processed_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.intake.intake_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.execution_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.workflow_version }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.source_type }}',
  {{ $json.intake.source_channel ? `'${$json.intake.source_channel}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.intake.contact_name ? `'${$json.intake.contact_name.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.intake.contact_email ? `'${$json.intake.contact_email}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.intake.contact_phone ? `'${$json.intake.contact_phone}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.intake.company_name ? `'${$json.intake.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.intake.request_type }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.service_category }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.urgency_level }}',
  {{ $json.intake.monthly_budget }},
  {{ $json.intake.message_body ? `'${$json.intake.message_body.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_payload).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.intake.validation_passed }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake.validation_errors) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.intake.is_spam }},
  {{ $json.intake.is_duplicate }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake.classification_result || {}) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.intake.confidence_score || 0 }},
  {{ $json.intake.ai_model_used ? `'${$json.intake.ai_model_used}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.intake.ai_model_source || 'none' }}',
  {{ $json.intake.ai_response_time_ms || 0 }},
  {{ $json.intake.ai_fallback_used }},
  {{ $json.intake.qualification_score || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.intake.qualification_tier }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.recommended_action }}',
  {{ $json.intake.route_taken ? `'${$json.intake.route_taken}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.intake.human_review_needed }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake.flags) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.intake.received_at }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.processed_at || new Date().toISOString() }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (intake_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING intake_id, qualification_tier, recommended_action;

INSERT INTO intake_log (
  intake_id, execution_id, workflow_version, client_id,
  source_type, contact_email, raw_payload, normalized_payload,
  validation_passed, validation_errors, qualification_tier,
  recommended_action, flags, received_at, processed_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.intake.intake_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.execution_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.workflow_version }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.intake.source_type }}',
  {{ $json.intake.contact_email ? `'${$json.intake.contact_email}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_payload).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  false,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake.validation_errors) }}'::jsonb,
  'invalid',
  'do_not_pursue',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.intake.flags) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.intake.received_at }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (intake_id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO workflow_errors (
  execution_id, workflow_id, error_type, error_message,
  failed_at, retry_count, resolved
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.execution.id }}',
  'customer_intake_v1',
  'fatal',
  '{{ ($json.error.message || 'Unknown error').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW(),
  0,
  false
);
